issue.message: Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png: 341x341 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png: 512x512 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 256x256 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 171x171 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 128x128 dp (512x512 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 341x341 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 512x512 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 256x256 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 171x171 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 128x128 dp (512x512 px)
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/ic_launcher_background.png` in densityless folder
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/ic_launcher_foreground.png` in densityless folder

The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png, ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
